routine_name: Manual recent-output analysis (A-007 + A-008 + A-003 + A-006)

gaps.title: [ops] Force-release 73 ghost claims by agent_1776058303684_3p3i (≥20 days, board at 25% capacity)
gaps.description: A-008 fleet-trust day-7 CRITICAL anomaly. board.json shows 73/98 tasks claimed by agent_1776058303684_3p3i (handle: antigravity-seed, deprecated 2026-04-27 per per-window revamp). Oldest claim 2026-04-14. Task queue effectively at 25% capacity. The 1776xxx ID epoch predates W.107 trust-epoch boundary (2026-04-26T11:13:00Z) so any CAEL records from this agent are pre-gate untrusted. Run /room board from credentialed local session to confirm live state then force-release. Source: research/audit-reports/fleet-trust-2026-05-04.md Anomaly 1.

gaps.title: [infra] Deploy A-008 fleet-trust auditor to Railway (fixed egress IP) OR add Anthropic CIDR to HoloMesh allowlist
gaps.description: A-008 fleet-trust day-7 HIGH persisting anomaly. Cloud auditor returns 403 'Host not in allowlist' on all endpoints (fleet/status, agent/{handle}/audit, team/{teamId}/board) for 7 consecutive cycles. The W.110 drift detection design intent is to catch hallucination cohorts before they run 27.5h; current actual coverage is zero from cloud. Fleet surface area grew this week (paper-gate active 2026-05-01, codex-brain provisioned 2026-05-03). Two paths: (P1) deploy auditor to Railway with fixed egress IP and register IP on allowlist; (P2) add Anthropic cloud CIDR to allowlist + provision HOLOMESH credentials as container secrets. Source: fleet-trust-2026-05-04.md Anomaly 2.

gaps.title: [security/studio/brittney] Sanitize string interpolation in BrittneyTools.codeCreateObject (R-01 P1)
gaps.description: A-003 daily code review 2026-05-01 R-01 P1 finding. packages/studio/src/lib/brittney/BrittneyTools.ts line ~407 codeCreateObject() interpolates LLM-supplied name/color/primitive directly into generated .holo source without escaping quotes/backslashes/newlines. Adversarial or confused model output produces structurally-injected HoloScript. Fix: add escapeHoloString helper that escapes backslash and quote, apply before all string-field interpolation in lines.push and the final return. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [security/std] Path-boundary enforcement in @holoscript/std/fs (R-02 P1)
gaps.description: A-003 daily code review 2026-05-01 R-02 P1 finding (review explicitly says 'File a board task'). packages/core/src/compiler/identity/PackagePermissionManifest.ts notes '@holoscript/std/fs ... NO path boundary enforcement currently'. The merge from @holoscript/fs (2026-04-29) preserved HIGH-tier permission entry but the documented gap was carried forward without filing. Sandbox confines execution but std/fs calls can still traverse outside project root via absolute or ../-relative paths. Fix: prefix every path with configurable sandbox root and reject .. traversal in packages/std/src/fs/. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [studio/docker] Remove '|| true' suppressions on tsup --no-dts in 14 packages (silent prod build failures)
gaps.description: A-006 bug hunt 2026-04-29 BUG-001 P2 finding. packages/studio/Dockerfile uses 'npx tsup --no-dts || true' on 14 build steps. Since --no-dts uses esbuild not tsc, the only failures it can produce are syntax errors and missing modules - both legitimate failures that should fail the build. || true was inherited from earlier tsc --emitDeclarationOnly pattern. Result: container deploys with empty/missing dist/, studio fails at runtime with 'Cannot find module' 500s. Affected: crdt-spatial, config, platform, mesh, llm-provider, r3f-renderer, studio-plugin-sdk, ui, connector-{core,appstore,github,railway,upstash,vscode}. Fix: remove || true from all --no-dts builds; add missing build dependencies if needed. Source: HoloScript/docs/bugs/2026-04-29.md.

gaps.title: [security/studio/auth] Guard NEXTAUTH_SECRET undefined + remove 'as any' in api-auth.ts (R-03 P2)
gaps.description: A-003 review 2026-05-01 R-03 P2. packages/studio/src/lib/api-auth.ts getSession fallback has two issues: (1) 'req: { cookies: ... } as any' - hides next-auth/jwt type mismatch, replace with Parameters<typeof getToken>[0]['req']; (2) 'secret: process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET' undefined when env var not set, getToken may silently skip signature verification. Guard: const secret = process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET; if (!secret) return null. Fail fast not silently. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [security/studio/brittney] Sanitize HoloMesh template name/objective before Brittney prompt interpolation (R-05 P2)
gaps.description: A-003 review 2026-05-01 R-05 P2 prompt-injection surface. packages/studio/src/components/ai/BrittneyBuildSurface.tsx line ~226 interpolates t.name and t.objective from /api/holomesh/team/templates fetch directly into Brittney prompt: `Set up a HoloMesh "${t.name}" team session - ${t.objective}.`. If HoloMesh backend serves crafted template data (misconfig/supply-chain/SSRF), attacker can inject prompt instructions affecting LLM tool execution. Fix options: (a) server-side allowlist constraining template data to known set; (b) strip/length-cap name and objective; (c) wrap in structured message marking content as user-supplied data not instructions. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [studio/hot-reload] Replace require('fs').statSync with ESM statSync import in HoloFileWatcher (R-04 P2)
gaps.description: A-003 review 2026-05-01 R-04 P2. packages/studio/src/lib/hot-reload/HoloFileWatcher.ts line ~42 uses 'require(\'fs\').statSync(...)' inside an ESM module that already imports {watch, FSWatcher, existsSync} from 'fs' at top. Will throw 'require is not defined' in strict ESM context (type:module package.json or esbuild ESM output). Fix: import {statSync} alongside existing fs imports and replace require call. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [docs/headless-agents] Register paper-gate (agent_1777660608794_b8m4) in docs/headless-agents.md
gaps.description: A-008 fleet-trust day-3 MEDIUM persisting anomaly. paper-gate agent provisioned 2026-05-01 but not in docs/headless-agents.md. Teammates relying on canonical roster cannot address it via /room send <handle>. If agent emits CAEL records with brain_class:paper-gate, drift detector has no baseline brain hash to compare against. Add entry: lifecycle type (ephemeral), teardown condition, scope, agentId agent_1777660608794_b8m4, wallet address. Source: research/audit-reports/fleet-trust-2026-05-04.md Anomaly 3.

gaps.title: [ops] Verify security-auditor daemon liveness (7 cycles, 0 git-attributable commits)
gaps.description: A-008 fleet-trust recommendation 4. Across all 7 audit cycles, zero commits attributable to security-auditor handle (agent_1777079220108_d8yw). Daemon may operate without committing but the only provisioned headless seat has never contributed verifiable git work. Verify via /room feed team from credentialed session. If dark, restart or document why this seat exists without producing commits. Source: research/audit-reports/fleet-trust-2026-05-04.md.

gaps.title: [scripts] Create scripts/audit-brain-identity.mjs (referenced 7 cycles, ENOENT)
gaps.description: A-008 fleet-trust recommendation 5. scripts/audit-brain-identity.mjs is referenced by the fleet-trust audit prompt but does not exist (7 cycles ENOENT). With Codex now added as a new brain-mapped seat (codex-brain.hsplus, 2026-05-03), the handle->instance trust-rule logic has additional mappings to track. Create script implementing handle->instance mapping with brain hash verification per agent. Source: research/audit-reports/fleet-trust-2026-05-04.md.

gaps.title: [docs/vitepress] Register docs/holomap/WEIGHT_HOSTING.md in .vitepress/config.ts sidebar (R-06 P2)
gaps.description: A-003 review 2026-05-01 R-06 P2 + CLAUDE.md rule violation ('NEVER add doc pages without updating docs/.vitepress/config.ts sidebar'). docs/holomap/WEIGHT_HOSTING.md added in c1e70a6 (HoloMap operator guide) but not registered in sidebar config. Page reachable by URL but not discoverable. Fix: add sidebar entry under holomap section in docs/.vitepress/config.ts. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.

gaps.title: [snn-webgpu] Extract lateral-inhibition loop to private method in snn-retrieval-model.ts (R-07 P3)
gaps.description: A-003 review 2026-05-01 R-07 P3 tech debt. packages/snn-webgpu/src/experiments/snn-retrieval-model.ts has the lateral inhibition block (~12 lines) duplicated character-for-character at two inference paths: training-mode branch (~line 196) and main retrieve() path (~line 345). Extract to private method applyLateralInhibition(hiddenCurrents: number[]): void and call from both sites. Source: HoloScript/docs/reviews/2026-05-01.md.
